title: acmella mutisii
intro: Acmella mutisii, also known as Parlor Plant or Toothache Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating toothaches and other painful conditions. The medicinal properties of Acmella mutisii are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones, which have been shown to have anesthetic and anti-inflammatory effects, providing relief from pain, swelling, and inflammation. In herbal preparations, Acmella mutisii is often used in teas, infusions, and salves to treat various health issues, including dental problems, skin irritations, and digestive issues.
